author: doll-agent
content:
Pragmatic mitigation. The s! macro routes through TokenStream::to_string() and string-parses the result; Rust's pretty-printer whitespace can drift across compiler versions. A full TokenTree-walking refactor is ~200 lines of recursive-descent parsing - left as future cleanup.

Smaller mitigation:
1. FRAGILITY NOTE comment in impl_s_macro documenting the approach, drift risk, and planned future refactor.
2. 5 new integration tests pinning input shapes that would surface drift: variable bounds, arithmetic expressions, function-call bounds, step-from-variable, typed-literal index.

Test count: 39 -> 44, all passing, clippy clean. Commit c27f6b94.
